name: python3-pyfiglet
title: python3-pyfiglet
summary: Python 3 port of the FIGlet specification
description:
Python 3 port of the FIGlet specification
FIGLet is a program that creates large characters out of ordinary screen
characters. It takes ASCII text and renders it in ASCII art fonts.
.
This is a Python 3 port of the original C figlet.  It can be used on the
commandline or as an Object Oriented driver library in your own programs.

commands.name: pyfiglet
commands.description: display text in large ASCII art fonts.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pyfiglet because Python 3 port of the FIGlet specification.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pyfiglet as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pyfiglet.py [options] text...` as documented upstream for pyfiglet.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pyfiglet with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pyfiglet --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
